title: Cobbleworld: Feybreak
description: A cobblemon add-on which aims to add the pals from the Feywilds update to your game! :)
body:
**This is my first publicly available addon!**

_Cobbleworld: Feybreak aims to add the pals from Palworld's latest update to cobblemon, presently only having tarantriss as of 0.0.1!_
